messages.content: Connect to the MUD, look at your surroundings, check your score, then look at the available exits and tell me what you see.
Connect to the MUD, look at your surroundings, check your score, then look at the available exits and tell me what you see.

name: look
result:
[0;33mThe Temple Of Midgaard[0m
   You are in the southern end of the temple hall in the Temple of Midgaard.
The temple has been constructed from giant marble blocks, eternal in
appearance, and most of the walls are covered by ancient wall paintings
picturing Gods, giants and peasants.
   Large steps lead down through the grand temple gate, descending the huge
mound upon which the temple is built and ends on the temple square below.
To the west, you see the Reading Room.  The donation room is in a small
alcove to your east.
[0;36m[ Exits: n e s w d ][0m
[0;32m[0;32mAn automatic teller machine has been installed in the wall here.
[0m
21H 100M 83V (news) >

text:
Connected and checked the area.

You are in **The Temple Of Midgaard**, at the southern end of the temple hall. The room is built from giant marble blocks, with ancient wall paintings showing gods, giants, and peasants. Large steps lead down through the grand temple gate toward the temple square below. There is also an **automatic teller machine** installed in the wall.

Your status:
- Level: **1**
- Class/title: **Dummy the Swordpupil**
- HP: **21/21**
- Mana: **100/100**
- Movement: **83/83**
- Gold: **0**
- XP: **248**
- XP needed for next level: **1752**
- Position: **Standing**
- Conditions: **Hungry and thirsty**

Available exits:
- **North** — By The Temple Altar
- **East** — The Midgaard Donation Room
- **South** — The Temple Square
- **West** — The Reading Room
- **Down** — The Temple Square
